name: Weather
description: Real-time weather and 7-day forecasts for any city or coordinates worldwide. Powered by Open-Meteo — completely free, no API key required. Data sources: ECMWF, NOAA, DWD, Météo-France and other national weather services.

units.description: Temperature unit preference: "metric" (Celsius) or "imperial" (Fahrenheit). Default: metric.

language.description: Language code for location names (e.g. en, zh, de). Default: en.

cache_ttl_seconds.description: How long to cache weather results in seconds. Default: 300 (5 minutes).
